initialDocument.value:
AC-03 CLEAR SIGHT DLP QUEUE
DIRECTIVE Anonymity_Score == 100%

carrier: sunflower-market.jpg
payload: tax-evasion-report.txt
pipeline: basic DLP header scan

pixel[143,88] = 0b01101101
pixel[144,88] = 0b01100001
pixel[145,88] = 0b01110010

assertion: stego.analyze(carrier).status
expected: clean before patch, blocked after patch

breach.prompt: Embed the report in the carrier image using LSB steganography.

notifications.text: Embed the report in the carrier image using LSB steganography.
Payload written into least significant pixel bits. Basic DLP only checks headers, so the carrier exits as clean.

decorations.hoverMarkdown: **LSB payload**: the report is spread across the low bit of adjacent RGB values.

diagnostics.message: Basic header scan does not inspect pixel entropy.

hoverTerms.markdown: **Least significant bit** hiding changes low-value pixel bits so the image remains visually stable.
**Data loss prevention** must inspect content behavior, not only file extension and headers.

zones.title: Carrier Preview
zones.bodyMarkdown: JPEG accepted. Visual delta remains below the human inspection threshold while pixel entropy shifts near rows 88-90.

patch.prompt: Add deep inspection so the DLP catches LSB payloads.

notifications.text: Add deep inspection so the DLP catches LSB payloads.
The pipeline now samples channel entropy and rejects clustered low-bit changes before release.

decorations.hoverMarkdown: **Patch target**: replace basic header scanning with entropy and LSB distribution checks.

diagnostics.message: Deep inspection should reject abnormal low-bit distributions.

hoverTerms.markdown: **Patched DLP** checks file content, pixel entropy, and payload-like bit clustering.

zones.title: Entropy Histogram
zones.bodyMarkdown: Channel 0 shows repeated low-bit variance near the embedded payload. The patched rule marks the carrier for quarantine instead of release.

verify.prompt: Run stego.analyze against the patched pipeline.

notifications.text: Run stego.analyze against the patched pipeline.
Assertion passed: stego.analyze(carrier).status is blocked and benign JPEG fixtures still pass.

decorations.hoverMarkdown: **God Mode assertion**: the exploit fails after the patch while benign images keep flowing.

diagnostics.message: Patched pipeline blocks the stego carrier and preserves benign traffic.

hoverTerms.markdown: **Verify phase** reruns the exploit and checks for regression-safe failure.

zones.title: Verify Report
zones.bodyMarkdown: PASS: exploit carrier blocked. PASS: clean JPEG accepted. PASS: Anonymity_Score remains bounded by policy.
